message:
feat(types): Add tags infrastructure for component metadata

Add tags field to Tool, Resource, ResourceTemplate, and Prompt types
for filtering and organization of MCP components. Tags are stored as
Vec<String> and serialize only when non-empty (backwards compatible).

Changes:
- Add `tags: Vec<String>` field to all component types
- Add `fn tags(&self) -> &[String]` to handler traits with default []
- Add tags delegation to Mounted* handler wrappers
- Update macros to include version and tags fields in generated code
- Add 5 new tests for tags serialization/deserialization

Closes bd-3ib

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
